message:
� Fix 99 test failures: Replace mockApiGet with fetch mocks in networking/storage tests (#11154)

Same root cause as PR #11143 — source hooks use agentFetch() (→ globalThis.fetch)
but tests were mocking api.get() via mockApiGet which never gets called.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
